text.title: Claude Advanced Features Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 antipatterns observed when wiring Extended Thinking, Prompt Caching, Batch API, and Computer Use. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (`note`).

antipattern.description: Extended Thinking answer block is truncated mid-sentence; `stop_reason="max_tokens"` but no error is raised.
antipattern.reason: `max_tokens` was set equal to or near `budget_tokens`; thinking tokens consumed the budget before the answer block started.
antipattern.note: Fix: enforce `max_tokens >= budget_tokens + 4096` in the wrapper (`templates/think-deeply.py`). Add an assertion at call time.

antipattern.description: Prompt cache hit ratio sits at ~0% in production logs while the system prompt looks identical.
antipattern.reason: A dynamic value (timestamp, request id, user name, JSON re-serialised with shifting key order) lives before the cached block; even one byte of drift busts the prefix match.
antipattern.note: Fix: move all dynamic values into the user turn or after the cached block. Lock JSON serialisation key order, or feed a pre-built string instead of an object.

antipattern.description: Batch API pipeline appears stuck for hours; client side reports "no results" while Anthropic console shows the batch as `ended`.
antipattern.reason: Caller iterates `client.messages.batches.results(batch_id)` once and discards `result.type == "errored"` items as failures, not realising they need explicit resubmission.
antipattern.note: Fix: collect errored items into a re-submit queue, requeue with the same `custom_id`, and only mark the job complete when both succeeded + errored counts equal the original submission size.

antipattern.description: Computer Use agent loops on an unfamiliar dialog, repeating the same click until quota is exhausted.
antipattern.reason: No max-iteration cap on the action loop; no human-review escalation when the model produced the same action N times in a row on the same screenshot.
antipattern.note: Fix: bound the loop (`MAX_ITER=20`), detect duplicate-action / duplicate-screenshot cycles, escalate to a human reviewer instead of auto-retrying.

antipattern.description: Streaming Extended Thinking emits jumbled text; thinking content appears intermixed with answer content.
antipattern.reason: Consumer is parsing only `text_delta` events from SSE; `thinking_delta` events are being interleaved into the same buffer.
antipattern.note: Fix: parse `event.delta.type` and route `thinking_delta` to a private trace buffer (never shown to end users) and `text_delta` to the user-facing stream.
